description: You are formatting a manuscript for Print-on-Demand (POD) publication. Prepare the manuscript 'The Yellow Wallpaper' at /home/ga/Documents/yellow_wallpaper_manuscript.odt as an A5 book interior. The document must use A5 page sizing (14.8 cm x 21.0 cm) with 0.75-inch margins on all sides. Format the body text using 11pt 'Liberation Serif' or 'DejaVu Serif' with justified alignment and a 0.25-inch first-line indent. The title 'THE YELLOW WALLPAPER' must be centered, bold, and at least 18pt, followed by the centered author line 'By Charlotte Perkins Gilman' and a page break. Each of the five sections (marked I, II, III, IV, V) must start on a new page with the Roman numeral centered and bold. Save the document to /home/ga/Documents/yellow_wallpaper_manuscript.odt.
